name: Chilled Watercress Bisque
recipeIngredient: 1 Can quick-frozen cream of potato soup
2 Cups washed, drained finely cut watercress
recipeInstructions:
1. Thaw the soup slightly by placing the opened can in a pan of hot water.
2. Pour the thawed soup into a glass container for an electric mixer or blender.
3. Add milk and watercress to the container.
4. Blend until smooth.
5. Refrigerate until well chilled.
6. Just before serving, pour the mixture back into the blender and blend for a few seconds.
7. If necessary, add a little cold milk or cream to achieve the desired consistency.
8. Serve in chilled soup cups.
Makes 3 or 4 servings.
